The following events took place in '''207 BBY'''.

==Events==
*[[Reidi Artom]] departs the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] to explore the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' mentions that Artom left for the Unknown Regions 175 years before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], which is dated to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. It can therefore be deduced that she departed 207 BBY.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-03-XX -->''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' {{Imo}}
